$comment: Pool-of-record manifest — seeded from docs/bias-pool-candidates.md (Tier 1 = items 1-8, backups B1-B3). Processed by scripts/clip-pipeline. DO NOT invent items here; the candidates doc + PM C/D pass are the authority (rt-answers RT-1). downloadUrl is filled at research time from the proof page; sha256/licenseSnapshot are written by the pipeline; window.approved is the PM's ear-confirmation.
